channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Bullish bets $4.2B on tokenized securities by buying Equiniti—bridging regulated transfer services with blockchain for 24/7 trading. 💥 https://Blockchain.News/news/bullish-acquires-equiniti-tokenization #crypto #tokenization #finance
